nasb.text: All that the Father gives Me will come to Me, and the one who comes to Me I will certainly not cast out.

esv.text: All that the Father gives me will come to me, and whoever comes to me I will never cast out.

cnv.text: 凡是父賜給我的人，必到我這裡來；到我這裡來的，我決不丟棄他，

ccb.text: 凡父赐给我的人，必到我这里来。到我这里来的，我总不丢弃他。

csbs.text: 凡是父赐给我的人，都会到我这里来，而到我这里来的人，我绝不丢弃，
